name: Ichigo
about:
Ichigo (Code:015) is the leader of the Children of Squad 13. She is an honor student amongst the Children and had shown the most promise after Hiro (Code:016) from a very early age. She is very considerate about everyone in her team and deeply cares for Hiro. She is childhood friends with Hiro and Goro (Code:056).

She is partnered with Goro and pilots the FRANXX Delphinium.
